channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: New Nano-Cage Technology Removes Most PFAS from Water
item.description: Researchers at Flinders University have developed a novel water filtration method capable of removing up to 98% of perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS), including short-chain variants ...

item.title: Peter Bol Aims for Commonwealth Games Gold After Strong Form at National Championships
item.description: Peter Bol, Australia's premier 800m runner, is setting his sights on Commonwealth Games gold in 2026 following a challenging few years. After winning silver at the 2022 Commonwealth Games and finishin...

item.title: Kitengela family seeks police action after businessman goes missing, CCTV shows abduction
item.description: On Thursday, 26th March 2026, at about 5:56 pm, Fortune Muthina Kinyanzui, a 34-year-old businessman in Kitengela, was abducted by three masked men. CCTV footage captured him being forced out of his g...

item.title: Man pleads not guilty to charges in death of GSU officer near State House
item.description: A man accused of killing a General Service Unit (GSU) officer close to State House in Nairobi has pleaded not guilty to murder charges. The suspect, identified as Paul Ng’ang’a, appeared before the Hi...

item.title: Genetic and Environmental Factors Behind Rising Kidney Disease in Africa
item.description: Kidney disease is emerging as a significant health challenge in Africa, with chronic kidney disease (CKD) causing substantial mortality and morbidity. Globally, CKD affects around 850 million people a...

item.title: Taylor Swift seen in ivory skirt as wedding with Travis Kelce approaches
item.description: Taylor Swift has given fans a glimpse of her upcoming wedding attire as she was spotted in New York wearing an elegant ivory satin skirt paired with a black top and strappy heels. The outfit, reminisc...

item.title: The Changing Landscape of Divorce in Kenya
item.description: The evolution of divorce law in Kenya has shifted from a rigid system that focused on blame to one that acknowledges personal freedom and dignity. Courts have increasingly moved away from the traditio...

item.title: Senator Susan Collins Urges Trump to Clarify U.S. Actions as Iran Deadline Nears
item.description: The Wall Street Journal article discusses remarks by Republican Senator Susan Collins concerning the escalating tensions between the United States and Iran in early 2026. Collins noted that President ...

item.title: NASA's Artemis II Crew Share Reflections from Space Before Returning to Earth
item.description: The four-person crew of NASA's Artemis II mission have shared their final reflections from space during their first-ever press conference conducted in orbit. Astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Ch...

item.title: Manipur family seeks justice for slain children, demands arrests of perpetrators
item.description: Tensions in Manipur have escalated following the tragic death of two children in a suspected rocket launcher attack in the village of Tronglaobi, Bishnupur district. The children, a five-year-old and ...

item.title: Ngorongoro Conservation Area Hosts Safari Field Challenge to Highlight Historical and Cultural Wonders
item.description: On April 9, 2026, the Ngorongoro Conservation Area Authority officially launched the Safari Field Challenge competition. The event, led by Commissioner Abdul-Razaq Badru, aims to showcase the rich cul...

item.title: Sandton suspect apprehended following high-speed chase after attempted robbery
item.description: A suspect has been arrested after a high-speed chase in Sandton that followed an attempted armed robbery near a hotel in the Bramley policing precinct on Thursday afternoon. Police spokesperson Brigad...

item.title: Sean Combs Appeals Conviction and Sentence Over Prostitution Charges
item.description: Lawyers representing hip-hop mogul Sean 'Diddy' Combs are set to appeal his conviction and four-year prison sentence, arguing that the trial judge relied on improper evidence during sentencing. Combs,...

item.title: Middle East Ceasefire Announced, Iran Holds Demonstrations
item.description: A ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran has been announced, with a two-week halt in military action to allow for peace talks. However, tensions remain, as Israeli Prime Minister Benja...

item.title: Celebrating 40 Years: A Ranking of Cocteau Twins' Defining Tracks
item.description: This retrospective examines the legacy of the Cocteau Twins, a pioneering band whose ethereal soundscapes profoundly influenced dream-pop and continue to inspire musicians four decades later. The arti...

item.title: Impact of Patrice Talon’s Political Reforms on Benin’s Presidential Election
item.description: Benin is heading to the polls on 12 April 2026 to elect its president in a context transformed by major political reforms introduced by President Patrice Talon. The restructuring of the party system a...

item.title: OC Transpo projects full O-Train Line 1 service restoration by late May
item.description: OC Transpo has announced that full service on Ottawa's O-Train Line 1 may be restored by the end of May, following a suspension due to spalling issues affecting the track. The transit authority has be...

item.title: Senator Bong Go inaugurates new Super Health Center in San Fernando, Bukidnon
item.description: Senator Bong Go led the inauguration and turnover of a new Super Health Center in San Fernando, Bukidnon on Monday, aiming to improve access to healthcare services for communities at the grassroots le...

item.title: Pakistan to host US-Iran talks aimed at sustaining recent ceasefire
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir reaffirmed Pakistan’s commitment to helping the United States and Iran reach a peaceful settlement amid ongoing ...

item.title: Paul Dano Discusses Music, Acting, and His Role in The Wizard of the Kremlin
item.description: In an extensive interview with The Guardian, Paul Dano reflects on his diverse career, from portraying Brian Wilson in 'Love & Mercy' to starring in the politically charged 'The Wizard of the Kremlin....
